steps.title: Interpret the equation
steps.content: The equation $$3x+4y=364$$ comes from counting straws: each triangle uses 3 straws and each rectangle uses 4 straws. If $x$ triangles and $y$ rectangles are built, the total straws used is $3x+4y$, which equals the given total of 364 straws.

steps.title: Evaluate the given ordered pair
steps.content:
Substitute $x=24$ and $y=73$: $$3(24)+4(73)=72+292=364$$. The left side equals the right side, so the pair satisfies the equation.

This means 24 triangles and 73 rectangles together use exactly 364 straws; thus, if 24 triangles were constructed, then 73 rectangles were constructed.
That is the correct answer.
